escalation.rationale: Multiple active conflicts with US-Iran ceasefire rejected, Russia-Ukraine fighting continuing, and Israel operating covert Iraq base.

ticker_items: Trump rejects Iran's ceasefire response as 'totally unacceptable'
Putin claims Ukraine war 'coming to an end'
Israel reportedly operated secret military base in Iraq
US helicopters sink Iranian boats in Strait of Hormuz

middle_east.description: Israeli airstrikes killed at least 24 people in Lebanon in one day
Israeli military launched wide series of airstrikes across southern Lebanon on May 7.

russia.text: The war in Ukraine is coming to an end
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: President

middle_east.text: The Iran war is not over
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Prime Minister

middle_east.text: Any such plans would be considered an escalation of the US-Israeli war on Iran and would be met with a military response
middle_east.speaker: Iranian deputy foreign minister
middle_east.title: Deputy Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: Iran's response to his latest proposal was TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE!
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Defense Minister Pistorius arrived in Kyiv for unannounced visit to discuss building new weapons systems with Ukraine. This represents continued German military support despite ongoing conflict stalemate.
UK planning to co-host multinational meeting with France on naval mission to escort ships through Strait of Hormuz. Iran has warned this would be met with military response, escalating tensions.
France partnering with UK to host multinational meeting on Hormuz escort mission. European leaders using Iran war as impetus to plan for self-defense without American support.
Pakistan serving as mediator between US and Iran, transmitting Tehran's response to American peace proposal. Nine killed in market explosion in Sarai Naurang.

financial.notes: Oil prices rose Monday following Trump's rejection of Iran peace proposal and continued Strait of Hormuz closure.

update_log.text: Wall Street Journal reports Israel operated covert military base in Iraq during Iran war
Trump dismisses Iran ceasefire response, oil markets react with price increases
Netanyahu states Iran war not over, signals indefinite Hezbollah fighting
EU imposes sanctions on 16 officials over Ukrainian children deportations
Trump rejects Iran's peace proposal response as 'totally unacceptable', oil prices surge
Iran warns UK-France multinational naval escort mission would be met with military response
Israeli airstrikes kill at least 24 people in Lebanon over past day
German Defense Minister Pistorius arrives in Kyiv for unannounced visit
